title: GetCategoriesResponseModel
description: GetCategoriesResponseModel schema from MarginEdge Public API

nextPage.description: Unique key for the next page of results

categoryType.description: Type of category (Food, Beer, Wine, Liquor, N/A Bev, Retail, Other, Labor, or a custom category type)

accountingCode.description: Account code for the category in the integrated accounting system

categoryName.description: Name of the category in MarginEdge

categoryId.description: Identifier of the category in MarginEdge
